name: RWBY: Princesses
description:
The Grimm have won, leaving ten young women as Salem's mercy: Ruby, Weiss, Blake, Yang, Pyrrha, Nora, Coco, Velvet, Emerald, and Neo. She will spare them, if they serve you, her heir, as lovers. It's that, or suffering for what little they had...

(Don't bother downvoting if the bot speaks for you, that's the LLM's issue. The LLM also has difficulty with multiple bots so... Make what you do.)

creator: Jack4884
